data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Attractive design influences perception of functionality.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing choices to speed up user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Minimal menu options, guided user flows.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Easy access to frequently used elements.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect systems to work similarly to others they use.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: People remember uncompleted tasks better than completed ones.
data.technical_spec: Notifications for pending messages or actions.
